title: Gradius VibrantShader
description: Minecraft Iris shader optimized for Intel HD/UHD graphics & low-end GPUs/iGPUs with stunning visuals
body:
# Gradius VibrantShader

Designed for low-end PCs and integrated graphics(igpus) that delivering stunning visuals while maintaining smooth performance.

To Make you have both graphics quality and maintain balance FPS at same time

Screenshot from Intel i3 **water reflection**

![water refection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c2427bf6a4e0a41d5fccbc26e047c32ad461aa2.png)

## Shader Features!!

1. Crispy bright lighting
2. Stunning water reflection
3. Beautiful godrays
4. TAA anti-aliasing
5. Optimized shadows
6. Waving trees and leaves
7. Dynamic grass movement
8. Cinematic lens flares
9. Darker night
10. Rain lens effects (water droplets during rain & thunderstorm)
11. Exclusively optimized for Intel HD/UHD Graphics

**Requirements**

- Iris Shaders, Oculus Shaders or OptiFine.
- OpenGL 2.1 support.
- Intel HD/UHD.

https://youtu.be/94wJg3dwWyU?si=txfy636E1TmITOK9

## That's the fist verison of shader so it's still in development and adding new features into it.

**Upcoming Features**

1. Shader Grass
2. Better Rain & Thunder visual
3. Better Nether & End visual
4. Better underwater visual 
5. Exprimental RTRT settings (Real Time Compute Ray Tracing for AMD's GCN architecture and the Polaris family especially gonna optimized for PS4pro Gradius & liverpool GPU
6. Rounded Sun & Moon

and more.....
